_comment: Regex patterns for Tier 1 deterministic entity detection. All patterns are pre-compiled at load time. To add a new pattern type, add a new key — no code changes required.

course_code.description: University course codes (e.g., CS-202, ENG-404, MATH-101, PHYS-301)

building_id.description: Campus building or hostel block identifiers (e.g., BLOCK-A, BLOCK-B)

exam_roll.description: Examination roll numbers issued per semester
